attributes.action: Stop U.K. military bases being used by USA to illegally attack Iran
attributes.additional_details: The war against Iran is recognised as an illegal act of aggression by the US. There is no legal basis for this war.
attributes.background: Rescind the decision by the PM that allows US military forces using U.K. bases to illegally attack Iran

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Stop allowing the US to use British bases for any action against Iran" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762916
